# Vendored CommonMark specification

`spec.txt` is the [CommonMark specification](https://spec.commonmark.org/), version `0.31.2`,
authored by John MacFarlane and contributors and released under the
[Creative Commons CC-BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/) license (see
`LICENSE`).

It is vendored here as a public format specification — an allowed source of truth for this
clean-room implementation. Only the embedded markdown **inputs** of its examples are used, as the
corpus driving the reader's differential tests; the expected output is regenerated by the pinned
oracle binary, never taken from the spec's reference HTML.

Refresh or re-pin with `tools/fetch-commonmark-spec.sh` (edit `SPEC_VERSION` to bump).
